description:
# Fine Dining Scallop Dish

A elegantly plated seafood dish features four seared scallops with a golden crust, arranged on a bed of bright green pea purée and garnished with fresh rosemary sprigs, chives, and delicate purple flowers, all presented on a pale blue plate with a creamy sauce. The professional plating and refined presentation suggest this is a high-end restaurant dish, photographed with soft, natural lighting that highlights the textures and colors of the carefully composed meal.
